audit_items.proof_trace: All raw `const char*` dereferences in string_utils.cc (in `c_escape_string_internal`, `xml_escape_string`, `json_escape_string`) are reachable only through `const std::string&` overloads (passing `.data()`, always non-null) or a fixed-size class-member array (`_magic_string` in rpc_server_message_stream.h:629). An exhaustive caller search finds no code path that passes NULL to any of these functions. The proof holds: no pointer dereference in string_utils.cc encounters NULL under any existing call chain.
